cards.back: Used to check if a record with a specific condition exists in the table
Used to select values from a table that exist in a specified list
Used to search for a specified pattern in a column, where '*' represents any characters and '%' represents any characters before or after the pattern
Used to combine rows from two or more tables, where the left table is joined with the right table based on a common column
Used to combine the result-set of two or more SELECT statements into one result-set, where each row from the first SELECT statement is matched with every row from the second SELECT statement
